title: Hardwiring Happiness
author: Rick Hanson
subline: The brain is a teakettle. The mind is the flame.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A side-view of a brain half (a profile). A neural network inside, with one new connection being FIERCELY lit up in RED. The new connection is the 'hardwiring' moment. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)">
    <!-- Brain silhouette as a 1000x500 ellipse profile, slightly tilted -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="540" ry="320" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="500" ry="280" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="440" ry="240" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- Network of dots -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c">
      <circle cx="-340" cy="-140" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-220" cy="-200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-100" cy="-220" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="40" cy="-180" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="200" cy="-200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="320" cy="-120" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-380" cy="40" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-280" cy="-30" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-180" cy="40" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-60" cy="-30" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="20" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="180" cy="-40" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="40" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="380" cy="80" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-340" cy="180" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-220" cy="200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="-80" cy="220" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="80" cy="200" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="220" cy="180" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="340" cy="160" r="5"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Old (faint) connections -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4">
      <line x1="-340" y1="-140" x2="-220" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="-220" y1="-200" x2="-100" y2="-220"/>
      <line x1="-100" y1="-220" x2="40" y2="-180"/>
      <line x1="40" y1="-180" x2="200" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="-200" x2="320" y2="-120"/>
      <line x1="-380" y1="40" x2="-280" y2="-30"/>
      <line x1="-280" y1="-30" x2="-180" y2="40"/>
      <line x1="-180" y1="40" x2="-60" y2="-30"/>
      <line x1="-60" y1="-30" x2="60" y2="20"/>
      <line x1="60" y1="20" x2="180" y2="-40"/>
      <line x1="180" y1="-40" x2="300" y2="40"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="40" x2="380" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="180" x2="-220" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="-220" y1="200" x2="-80" y2="220"/>
      <line x1="-80" y1="220" x2="80" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="80" y1="200" x2="220" y2="180"/>
      <line x1="220" y1="180" x2="340" y2="160"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The NEW connection in RED, much thicker, with a glow halo -->
    <line x1="-220" y1="-200" x2="-60" y2="-30" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="-60" y1="-30" x2="220" y2="180" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="-220" cy="-200" r="10" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="220" cy="180" r="10" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- label -->
    <text x="-30" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">NEW LINK</text>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">EXPERIENCE-DEPENDENT NEUROPLASTICITY</text>
</svg>
rationale: A 2D brain silhouette (concentric ellipses) populated with 20 graphite neurons and faint interconnects. Two neurons in the upper-left and lower-right are circled in red, with two thick red lines firing between them — a 'new link' that wasn't there before. That's the book's argument rendered: take in the good, build new neural connections. 'NEW LINK' in red sits between them. Title 320px uppercase stacks at top.
